# Archived GitHub Actions workflows

These workflows were archived to stop overlapping and duplicate CI/CD triggers after standardizing on the core pipeline set:

- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`
- `.github/workflows/codeql.yml`
- `.github/workflows/dependabot.yml`
- `.github/workflows/security.yml`

Archived workflows are retained for reference and can be restored if branch protection or legacy rollout paths still require them.
